query:
SELECT o.id, o.groupId, o.name, o.priceExtra, o.isActive 
FROM menu_addon_options o 
WHERE o.groupId IN (30004, 30006, 30008) 
ORDER BY o.groupId, o.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DPRZMbFg2pLCxP.d66dc093df58 --database hEsNGYEonud5ngJEe9CdHq --execute SELECT o.id, o.groupId, o.name, o.priceExtra, o.isActive 
FROM menu_addon_options o 
WHERE o.groupId IN (30004, 30006, 30008) 
ORDER BY o.groupId, o.id;
